vibe: Authority, Clarity, Truth, Objective, Rigid, Functional
design_principles: Function Over Decoration: 95% of the UI must be monochrome. Color exists exclusively to guide action or indicate state.
Grid Transparency: Expose the skeleton. Use 1px sharp borders to define spaces instead of soft dropshadows.
Optical Hierarchy: Use stark contrast in typography weights (e.g., Black vs Regular) rather than relying on varied font sizes.
Dense but Breathable: Use 'Control Room' grids with tight gaps (gap-4/6) but generous internal padding (p-6) within containers.
The Anti-Default: Prohibit soft rounded corners (use rounded-none or rounded-sm max). No generic 'Inter' for headings.

tailwind_classes.btn_secondary: bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-100 transition-colors
tailwind_classes.input: border border-zinc-300 rounded-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:border-transparent focus:outline-none transition-all

typography.anti_pattern_reminder: DO NOT use Inter for Headings. DO NOT use generic soft fonts.

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 items-start
layout_and_spacing.radius_rules: Use rounded-none or rounded-sm (2px) strictly. No rounded-lg or rounded-xl.

components.forms: Use pure HTML/Tailwind structured via Shadcn's Form wrapper. Inputs must be sharp-edged. Labels must be uppercase 'text-xs tracking-wide' to fit the Swiss aesthetic. Provide JSX logic, not TSX.
components.tables: Flat data tables. `border-collapse`. Rows have `border-b border-zinc-200`. NO alternating row colors. Hover effect: `hover:bg-zinc-50`.
components.cards: Do NOT use heavy dropshadows. Rely on a 1px `border-zinc-200` to separate cards from the pure white background. The 'Grid Borders' look.
components.navigation: Solid white sidebar or top nav. Use active states clearly (`bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900` for active, `text-zinc-500` for inactive).
components.modals_dialogs: Solid white background, sharp corners (`rounded-sm`), subtle dark overlay (`bg-zinc-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm`).
components.toast: Use Sonner. Configure for bottom-right. Styling: solid white bg, sharp 1px border, text-zinc-900, icon color matching success/error.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Every interactive element MUST explicitly declare hover text and background colors.
motion_and_interaction.focus_states: Accessibility critical. All inputs/buttons must have a 2px solid ring (`focus:ring-blue-600`) with no blur.

icons_and_assets.style: Use 'Regular' or 'Bold' weights. Avoid 'Thin' or 'Duotone' to maintain high-contrast clarity.

media_urls.description: Minimalist geometric pattern serving as the company logo in header/login.
Abstract minimalist architectural background for the split-screen login page.
Clean, empty white space with architectural elements to use when no tasks exist.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Do not use generic rounding (like rounded-lg). Stick to sharp borders (rounded-none or rounded-sm max).
2. Use Chivo for all headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
3. Apply 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements for automated testing.
4. Use the provided media URLs exclusively. DO NOT use generic placeholders like via.placeholder.com.
5. Rely on monochrome palettes (zinc-50 to zinc-900). Use primary color (blue) purely for CTAs, focus rings, and active states.
6. Build the layout using 'Control Room' grid philosophy (dense but structured, grid-cols-4 for main dashboard stats, grid-cols-3 for tasks list).
7. Note: The frontend uses JavaScript (.js/.jsx) instead of TypeScript (.tsx).
